sigWerErrors.reason: '74' and 'bảy mươi bốn' are numerically equivalent (both mean seventy-four in Vietnamese), so this is just a difference in format.
'84' and 'tám mươi bốn' are numerically equivalent (both mean eighty-four in Vietnamese), so this is just a difference in format.
